title: Implement a lookaside storage for signatures of images in Docker registries
body: This vendors in unmerged https://github.com/containers/image/pull/52 and updates the API usage.  See the documentation in that PR for more details.

comments.body: TODO? This would very much benefit from an integration test.
Rebased, now depends only on https://github.com/containers/image/issues/52 .  Still would benefit from an integration test.

Tests now exist (in #177), but depend on pushing to tags in Docker registries.  But with a hackish way to do that, they pass; so this PR + the containers/image implementation is ready for review and merging.
@mtrmac https://github.com/projectatomic/skopeo/pull/170/commits/91ebebce1388442b0f301aea6fadc38995cda3bb LGTM (I LGTM'ed the vendor in containers/image also)
